title: Installing Docker Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on Docker installation and setup.

questions.question: Regarding the DevOps, what is 'Docker Desktop' used for?
options: Building, testing, and managing Docker containers directly on your Windows or macOS development machine

questions.question: Which of these is a key step in a Docker-installation-based workflow for a project?
options: Using Docker Desktop's user-friendly graphical installer to handle exactly how Docker and its dependencies are installed correctly on your development machine
Recording a commit directly through SQL
Its only possible for SQL repositories
